subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 1.1.1 Demonstrate understanding of how to generate own ideas for artistic expressions on the people, based on their history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues
indicator_description: Think about the people who live in the local community and describe what you know about their history and their culture or way of life

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 1.1.1 Demonstrate understanding of how to generate own ideas for artistic expressions on the people, based on their history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues
indicator_description: Think about and describe the different visual artworks that are produced or found in the local community

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 1.1.1 Demonstrate understanding of how to generate own ideas for artistic expressions on the people, based on their history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues
indicator_description: Reflect on own experiences and talk about how the visual artworks produced or found in the local community reflect the natural environment

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 1.1.1 Demonstrate understanding of how to generate own ideas for artistic expressions on the people, based on their history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues
indicator_description: Explore own experiences and talk about how the visual artworks produced or found in the local community reflect local topical issues

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 2.1.1 Demonstrate understanding of how to generate own ideas for artistic expressions on the people, based on their history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues
indicator_description: Think about the people who live in the local community and describe what you know about their history and their culture or way of life

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 2.1.1 Demonstrate understanding of how to generate own ideas for artistic expressions on the people, based on their history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues
indicator_description: Think about and describe the different performing artworks that are produced or performed in the local community

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 2.1.1 Demonstrate understanding of how to generate own ideas for artistic expressions on the people, based on their history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues
indicator_description: Reflect on own experiences and talk about how the performing artworks produced or performed in the local community reflect the natural environment

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 2.1.1 Demonstrate understanding of how to generate own ideas for artistic expressions on the people, based on their history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues
indicator_description: Explore own experiences and talk about how performing artworks produced or performed in the local community reflect local topical issues

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 1.2.2 Demonstrate understanding of how to organise own ideas through experimenting with available media and techniques for creating/composing artworks, based on the history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues of other communities.
indicator_description: Reflect on own experiences of visual artworks produced or found in the local community to plan for making own artworks from imagination to reflect the history and culture or way of life of the people

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 1.2.2 Demonstrate understanding of how to organise own ideas through experimenting with available media and techniques for creating/composing artworks, based on the history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues of other communities.
indicator_description: Develop ideas for making own visual artworks that express own understanding of visual artworks produced or found in the local community

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 1.2.2 Demonstrate understanding of how to organise own ideas through experimenting with available media and techniques for creating/composing artworks, based on the history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues of other communities.
indicator_description: Explore available means of using relevant visual arts making tools, materials and methods to make own artworks that reflect the natural and man-made environments of the local community

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 1.2.2 Demonstrate understanding of how to organise own ideas through experimenting with available media and techniques for creating/composing artworks, based on the history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues of other communities.
indicator_description: Make firm decisions on the relevant visual arts making tools, materials and methods for creating own visual artworks that reflect local topical issues in the local community

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 2.2.2 Demonstrate understanding of how to organise own ideas through experimenting with available media and techniques for creating/composing artworks, based on the history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues of other communities.
indicator_description: Reflect on own experiences of performing artworks that are produced or performed in the local community to plan for creating own artworks that will reflect the history and culture or way of life of people in the local community

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 2.2.2 Demonstrate understanding of how to organise own ideas through experimenting with available media and techniques for creating/composing artworks, based on the history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues of other communities.
indicator_description: Develop ideas for making own artworks that express own understanding of performing artworks produced or performed in the local community

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 2.2.2 Demonstrate understanding of how to organise own ideas through experimenting with available media and techniques for creating/composing artworks, based on the history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues of other communities.
indicator_description: Explore available means of using relevant performing arts instruments, resources and methods to create own artworks that reflect the natural and manmade environments of the local community

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 2.2.2 Demonstrate understanding of how to organise own ideas through experimenting with available media and techniques for creating/composing artworks, based on the history and culture, the environment and the topical local/national/global issues of other communities.
indicator_description: Make firm decisions on the relevant performing arts instruments, resources and methods for making own artworks that will reflect topical issues in the local community

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 1.2.3 Demonstrate understanding of how to create expressive artworks based on own ideas by applying knowledge of media and methods of production to reflect other cultures in Africa, the visual artists, their culture, the environment and emerging topical issues
indicator_description: Create own artworks from imagination using available tools, materials and methods to represent visual artworks produced or found in the local community that reflect the history and culture or way of life of the people
examplars:
1. carefully select and use available tools, materials and methods of production to make own visual artworks such as drawing, doodling, patterns and modelling that reflect the history and culture of the people;
2. create useful artworks that reflects the history and culture of the local community, such as stools and symbols.

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 1.2.3 Demonstrate understanding of how to create expressive artworks based on own ideas by applying knowledge of media and methods of production to reflect other cultures in Africa, the visual artists, their culture, the environment and emerging topical issues
indicator_description: Create own artworks from imagination to express own ideas of the visual artworks produced or found in the local community that reflect the natural and manmade environments
examplars:
1. recall visual artworks produced or found in the local community that were made from natural and manmade objects or things (e.g. clay pots, ceramic ware, cane or plastic baskets, fabrics, wood carvings, glass or stone beads);
2. make prints or line drawings of available visual artworks and use them to create patterns.

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 1.2.3 Demonstrate understanding of how to create expressive artworks based on own ideas by applying knowledge of media and methods of production to reflect other cultures in Africa, the visual artists, their culture, the environment and emerging topical issues
indicator_description: Create own visual artworks to express own views, knowledge and understanding of topical issues in the local community

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 2.2.3 Demonstrate understanding of how to create expressive artworks based on own ideas by applying knowledge of media and methods of production to reflect other cultures in Africa, the visual artists, their culture, the environment and emerging topical issues
indicator_description: Create own artworks based on performing artworks produced or performed in the local community that reflect the history and culture or way of life of the people
examplars:
1. plan and perform basic dance movements and patterns based on dances performed in the local and community;
2. select and use suitable and appropriate instruments and resources such as drums, shakers, rattles and whistles to create own music, dance and drama.

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 2.2.3 Demonstrate understanding of how to create expressive artworks based on own ideas by applying knowledge of media and methods of production to reflect other cultures in Africa, the visual artists, their culture, the environment and emerging topical issues
indicator_description: Create own artworks to express own ideas of performing artworks produced or found in the local community that reflect the natural and manmade environments
examplars:
1. perform basic movements and style of local music, dance and drama artworks that reflect the natural and manmade environments in the local community;
2. perform own music, dance and drama using available instruments, resources and techniques in the local community to express ideas about the natural and manmade environments.

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 2.2.3 Demonstrate understanding of how to create expressive artworks based on own ideas by applying knowledge of media and methods of production to reflect other cultures in Africa, the visual artists, their culture, the environment and emerging topical issues
indicator_description: Create own performing artworks to express own views, knowledge and understanding of artworks that reflect topical issues in the local community

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 1.3.4. Demonstrate understanding of how to plan a display/presentation of a portfolio of own artworks by identifying, and preparing a venue, selecting and grouping of artworks and inviting target audience for the planned display/performance.
indicator_description: Plan a display of own artworks to share creative experiences based on visual artworks produced or found in the local community that reflect the history and culture of the people

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 1.3.4. Demonstrate understanding of how to plan a display/presentation of a portfolio of own artworks by identifying, and preparing a venue, selecting and grouping of artworks and inviting target audience for the planned display/performance.
indicator_description: Plan for a display of own visual artworks to share creative experiences based on ideas that reflect the natural and manmade environments in the local community
examplars:
1. clean the classroom or available space and organise it for the exhibition;
2. plan the arrangement of own artworks to share, educate and inform the public on the natural and manmade environments in the local community.

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 1.3.4. Demonstrate understanding of how to plan a display/presentation of a portfolio of own artworks by identifying, and preparing a venue, selecting and grouping of artworks and inviting target audience for the planned display/performance.
indicator_description: Plan a display of own visual artworks to share own creative experiences based on ideas that reflect topical issues in the local community

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 2.3.4. Demonstrate understanding of how to plan a display/presentation of a portfolio of own artworks by identifying, and preparing a venue, selecting and grouping of artworks and inviting target audience for the planned display/performance.
indicator_description: Plan a display of own artworks to share own creative experiences based on performing artworks that reflect the history and culture or way of life of the people

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 2.3.4. Demonstrate understanding of how to plan a display/presentation of a portfolio of own artworks by identifying, and preparing a venue, selecting and grouping of artworks and inviting target audience for the planned display/performance.
indicator_description: Plan for a display of own performing artworks to share own creative experiences based on ideas that reflect the natural and manmade environments in the local community

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 2.3.4. Demonstrate understanding of how to plan a display/presentation of a portfolio of own artworks by identifying, and preparing a venue, selecting and grouping of artworks and inviting target audience for the planned display/performance.
indicator_description: Plan a display of own performing artworks to share own creative experiences based on ideas that reflect topical issues in the local community

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 1.3.5. Demonstrate understanding of how to display/present a portfolio of art works that share own knowledge, concepts, ideas and experiences with audience through display/presentation; and using senses/manual/digital applications where necessary, to record for reporting on the events
indicator_description: Exhibit own artworks to share own creative experiences of visual artworks that reflect the history and culture or way of life of people in the local community
examplars: 1. display portfolio of own visual artworks to educate and inform the public on the history and culture of people in the local community.

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 1.3.5. Demonstrate understanding of how to display/present a portfolio of art works that share own knowledge, concepts, ideas and experiences with audience through display/presentation; and using senses/manual/digital applications where necessary, to record for reporting on the events
indicator_description: Exhibit own artworks to share own creative experiences of visual artworks that reflect the natural and manmade environments of the local community
examplars: 1. display portfolio of own visual artworks to educate and inform the public on the natural and manmade environments of the local community.

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 1.3.5. Demonstrate understanding of how to display/present a portfolio of art works that share own knowledge, concepts, ideas and experiences with audience through display/presentation; and using senses/manual/digital applications where necessary, to record for reporting on the events
indicator_description: Exhibit own artworks to share own creative experiences of visual artworks that reflect topical issues in the local community

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 2.3.5. Demonstrate understanding of how to display/present a portfolio of art works that share own knowledge, concepts, ideas and experiences with audience through display/presentation; and using senses/manual/digital applications where necessary, to record for reporting on the events
indicator_description: Perform or present own artworks to share own creative experiences of performing artworks that reflect the history and culture or way of life of people in the local community

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 2.3.5. Demonstrate understanding of how to display/present a portfolio of art works that share own knowledge, concepts, ideas and experiences with audience through display/presentation; and using senses/manual/digital applications where necessary, to record for reporting on the events
indicator_description: Perform own artworks to share own creative experiences of performing artworks that reflect the natural and manmade environments in the local community
examplars:
1. plan to perform own music, dance and drama to share, educate and inform the target audience on things that reflect the natural and manmade environments in the local community;
2. plan to present some of the music, dance and drama performed in the local community.

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 2.3.5. Demonstrate understanding of how to display/present a portfolio of art works that share own knowledge, concepts, ideas and experiences with audience through display/presentation; and using senses/manual/digital applications where necessary, to record for reporting on the events
indicator_description: Perform own artworks to share own creative experiences of performing artworks that reflect topical issues in the local community

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 1.4.6. Demonstrate understanding of how to analyse, appreciate, appraise/critique and present report on own works and that of others based on established guide for judging artworks (the theme, subject matter, media, techniques, elements and principles of design, social, aesthetic, cultural and functional values), the recordings and reports
indicator_description: Agree on guidelines for viewing and expressing feelings and thoughts about own and others' displayed visual artworks
examplars:
1. agree to the guidelines to view, examine and come out with meaning from visual artworks;
2. express own feelings and ideas about own and others' displayed artworks.

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 1.4.6. Demonstrate understanding of how to analyse, appreciate, appraise/critique and present report on own works and that of others based on established guide for judging artworks (the theme, subject matter, media, techniques, elements and principles of design, social, aesthetic, cultural and functional values), the recordings and reports
indicator_description: Use the agreed guidelines to examine and derive meaning from own and others' displayed visual artworks

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 2.4.6. Demonstrate understanding of how to analyse, appreciate, appraise/critique and present report on own works and that of others based on established guide for judging artworks (the theme, subject matter, media, techniques, elements and principles of design, social, aesthetic, cultural and functional values), the recordings and reports
indicator_description: Agree on guidelines for viewing and expressing feelings and thoughts about own and others' displayed performing artworks
examplars: 1. agree on guidelines for use to view, examine and come out with meaning from music, dance and drama to express own feelings and ideas of own and others' performed artworks.

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 2.4.6. Demonstrate understanding of how to analyse, appreciate, appraise/critique and present report on own works and that of others based on established guide for judging artworks (the theme, subject matter, media, techniques, elements and principles of design, social, aesthetic, cultural and functional values), the recordings and reports
indicator_description: Use the agreed guidelines to examine and derive meaning from own and others' displayed performing artworks

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 1.4.7. Demonstrate understanding of how to make informed decisions on displays, presentations, performances, recordings and/or reports based on established guide for judging artworks (the theme, subject matter, media, techniques, elements and principles of design, social, aesthetic, cultural and functional values) for correlation, correction and future modifications
indicator_description: Examine the displayed performing artworks and make decisions on the beauty and usefulness of each artwork based on the agreed guidelines

subject: Creative Arts
content_standard: B1 1.4.7. Demonstrate understanding of how to make informed decisions on displays, presentations, performances, recordings and/or reports based on established guide for judging artworks (the theme, subject matter, media, techniques, elements and principles of design, social, aesthetic, cultural and functional values) for correlation, correction and future modifications
indicator_description: Report own views and feelings about the displayed visual artworks and suggest how the artworks can be modified or improved

content_standard: B1 2.4.7. Demonstrate understanding of how to make informed decisions on displays, presentations, performances, recordings and/or reports based on established guide for judging artworks (the theme, subject matter, media, techniques, elements and principles of design, social, aesthetic, cultural and functional values) for correlation, correction and future modifications
indicator_description: Examine the displayed performing artworks and make decisions on the beauty and usefulness of each artwork based on the agreed guidelines

indicator_description: Report own views and feelings about the displayed performing artworks and suggest how the artworks can be modified or improved
